intent: Wide-shell 2BR / 2 baths DISTRIBUTED, QUADRANT split, GR style — 14x11 lot, NO CARPORT. Envelope 10x7 = 70 m² floor. Private and public occupy diagonal corners rather than a clean vertical or horizontal split. Front band: great_room (left, hosts entry) + standard bedroom (right). Rear band: master + ensuite (left), hall + common T&B stacked (hall in front, T&B behind) in the middle, kitchen (right). Hall is the circulation hinge — open to great_room and to kitchen, hosts master's and common's only doors. Standard's only door is to great_room; standard<->kitchen is a geometry-only wall, no door.
must_haves: private and public in diagonal quadrants, not a single-axis split
master ensuite, master's only door is via the hall
hall stacked in front of common T&B, open to great_room and kitchen
standard bedroom's only door is into great_room
